task: Advanced high-economic-value task: Convert the embedded noisy operational evidence into a defensible action plan for a constrained engineering window to perform finite-capacity schedule repair for a bottleneck cell. Using only the embedded packet, separate confirmed failures from warnings, compute the economic/safety margin (margin = normalized_threshold_score - observed_risk_score), list evidence that controls the final decision, apply the rules for margin classification (negative = fail, 0-5% = warn, >5% = pass), and propose remediation option combinations only if total cost <= remediation_budget_usd. Produce schedule_repair.xlsx and production_control_note.md that include formulas/executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final decision table. Mark any unresolved ambiguity as needs_review. Trigger expert-review if any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift.
